catalogData.name: Mana
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Astral Strength
powers.raw: Astral Strength (Trait): +2DV with Fist attack against astral targets
powers.text: +2DV with Fist attack against astral targets

powers.name: Aid Mysticism
powers.raw: Aid Mysticism (Complex Action, Sustained): You gain Aura Manipulation talent, but Mysticism max is spirit's Force. Or, gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus to Mysticism with Aura Manipulation.
powers.text: You gain Aura Manipulation talent, but Mysticism max is spirit's Force. Or, gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus to Mysticism with Aura Manipulation.

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Arcane Burst
powers.raw: Arcane Burst (Complex Action): Cast Manaball at Force. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
powers.text: Cast Manaball at Force. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.

powers.name: Mana Break
powers.raw: Mana Break (Complex Action): Use Negate at Force. Can't target anima directly or target same effect twice.
powers.text: Use Negate at Force. Can't target anima directly or target same effect twice.

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action): Cast Detect Magic at Force

powers.name: Use Mysticism
powers.raw: Use Mysticism (Interrupt Action): Use Counter at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Knowing Mind
greatFormPowers.raw: Knowing Mind (Complex Action, Sustained): Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
greatFormPowers.text: Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
